title: Item Sprites
body:
Most non-full-blocks feature a hand-drawn sprite in inventories, but many lack one! This pack aims to fix that by giving a dedicated 2D icon to every item that should have one according to Mojang's typical rules. I've picked colors straight from existing textures to stay as faithful to vanilla as possible. Not everything is finished yet, but I hope it makes your inventory screens a little more consistent already!

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/856b51acd2fd0350cbea2db96a7753888136824b.png)
*Sample of items next to Vanilla textures*

**Current Features:**
- Beds
- Trapdoors
- Fences
- Dripleaf and Azaleas
- Anvils, Grindstones and Stonecutters
- Chains, Lightning Rods, and End Rods
